traits.name: Lucky
traits.description: Reroll 1s on attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws.

traits.name: Brave
traits.description: Advantage on saves against being frightened.

traits.name: Halfling Nimbleness
traits.description: Move through the space of any creature larger than you.

traits.name: Naturally Stealthy
traits.description: Hide even when obscured only by a larger creature.
